lifecycle.reason: public Kubernetes template is in template-maintenance; resume only after a new phase is selected.

notes: Harness code and runner structure are intentionally unchanged.
AGENTS.md is a map; active management instructions are JSON under docs/management.

reviewFindingPriority.rule: Before starting automation implementation work, Codex must fix or otherwise resolve active Claude Code review and security findings first unless the user explicitly overrides that priority.
